raw_user_request: Make me a meal planner dashboard app.
concrete_goal: Create a browser-based meal planner dashboard for busy parents to plan dinners, grocery needs, and prep status from a first-screen workflow.
success_criteria: Users can create, edit, and filter weekly meal plan records.
The dashboard shows grocery status, prep state, and empty or validation states.
assumptions: Local browser state is enough for the prototype.
implementation_constraints: Do not add paid services or external APIs.

scenario_flows.name: Create dinner plan
steps: Add a dinner entry with ingredients and prep status.
Save the entry and filter by grocery-needed status.
scenario_flows.expected_result: The saved dinner appears in the planner with grocery and prep indicators.

verification_matrix.behavior_check: Check create, edit, filter, validation, and responsive behavior.

acceptance_evidence_plan: Desktop and mobile screenshots plus behavior, accessibility, and state coverage.
iteration_policy: Rework until the review score reaches the quality threshold.
